title: ipomoea malvacea var. involuta
intro: Ipomoea malvacea var. involuta is a type of morning glory vine native to tropical Asia, characterized by its unique, twisted leaves and trumpet-shaped flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea malvacea var. involuta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications for its soothing and calming properties.
